title: boltonia diffusa
intro: Boltonia diffusa, also known as White Doll's Daisy or False Aster, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Boltonia diffusa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
